entities.librarian: a librarian standing in front of curtains
entities.garden: a secret garden visible through a gap in the curtains

scenes.title: The Library Secret
scenes.background_prompt: A grand old library with floor-to-ceiling bookshelves, a reading desk with a green lamp, heavy velvet curtains along one wall, and a Persian rug. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A grand old library with mahogany floor-to-ceiling bookshelves packed with leather-bound volumes. A librarian — an older woman with silver hair pinned up, wearing a long navy blue cardigan and a pearl necklace — stands directly in front of a pair of heavy dark red velvet curtains that hang along the back wall, arms behind her back. She partially blocks the view, but behind her, through a narrow gap where the curtains don't quite meet, a sliver of something unexpected is visible: a lush secret garden with bright green plants, a stone fountain, and sunlight — completely incongruous with the dim, book-lined interior. A reading desk with a green banker's lamp and an open atlas sits to the left. A Persian rug in deep red and blue covers the wooden floor.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place librarian standing directly in front of the heavy velvet curtains (back wall), arms behind her back, partially blocking the view. Through a narrow gap in the curtains behind her, a sliver of a secret garden with green plants, stone fountain, and sunlight should be barely visible.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground, a large, ornate rug with a red center and intricate blue, cream, and orange patterns covers the wooden floor. On the left side of the rug stands a librarian, a young girl with long brown hair tied with a blue ribbon, wearing round glasses, a yellow knit cardigan over a light blue collared shirt, a pleated green skirt, and brown lace-up boots; she stands with her hands behind her back, looking toward the center of the room. Behind her is a doorway framed by heavy green curtains pulled back with gold tie-backs, revealing a garden with a stone path, a small stone fountain, and lush green foliage under a bright sky. To the right of the librarian is a large, dark brown wooden desk. On top of the desk sits a green-shaded banker's lamp with a gold base, an open book with white pages, and a small blue inkwell containing a white feather quill. To the right of the desk is a large, plush armchair upholstered in a beige and brown floral pattern. Behind the desk and armchair are tall wooden bookshelves divided by four decorative wooden pillars; the shelves are filled with numerous books in shades of blue, green, red, yellow, and brown. On the far right, a large arched window looks out onto another part of the garden, featuring a small cottage with a thatched roof, a large tree, and white flowers. The background above the bookshelves shows a light blue sky with soft white clouds and the tops of large green trees.
